sourceAmbiguity: Provider-console screenshots can expose credential references, callback hosts, sender identifiers, or contact data.
decisionTaken: Evidence capture uses redaction patterns, redacted screenshot naming, and JSON sanitization before artifacts are written.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: External provider evidence must be useful for audit without leaking regulated or credential-bearing material.
operationalRisk: Raw console evidence could disclose provider material or patient contact routes in the repository.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Extend redaction selectors for each new provider console surface before enabling live mutation.
